---
title: "weather_data"
output: html_document
---
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(ivanfirstpackage)
library(tidyverse)
data("Flagstaff_Weather")
```
max temp in flagstaff from 2015 - 2019

```{r}
ggplot(Flagstaff_Weather, aes(x = DATE, y = TMAX)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "Daily Maximum Temperature in Flagstaff", x = "Date", y = "Maximum Temperature")
```
